title: Unobtrusive Weather
description: Makes rain and snow particles smaller! Not called "Unobstructive Weather"... lol
body:
Thanks for 200,000 downloads <3

Makes rain and snow particles 1x1 pixels to increase visibility, this can also help video bitrate for streamers/creators!

Supports [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain).

---

Rain comparison:
![Rain Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/67f0fKM2/images/93230fa20008381a292c633c63600953ebbd37a6.png)

Snow comparison:
![Snow Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/67f0fKM2/images/9d062dceb6240afdf825bf009cd8e01a8a130f01.png)

---

Modpacks are free to use this pack **as long as they provide credit!**
